fields.label: Category
fields.options:
Hotel
Food Allowance
Travel
Supplies
Communication
Misc
fields.description: Expense category. Locked Select; no free-text. PD-S38 Fix #5 added 'Travel'; Fix #7 renamed 'Food' → 'Food Allowance' (portal auto-fills ₹380/day on selection).

fields.label: Days (Food Allowance)
fields.description: Number of days for Food Allowance.

fields.label: Amount (₹)
fields.description: Absolute amount in INR. Must be > 0 (validated by parent's validate()).

fields.label: Description
fields.description: What the expense was for. Free-form text, reqd for audit trail.

fields.label: Receipt / Attachment
fields.description: Receipt or supporting document. Optional but strongly recommended.
